transcript: VNL week 3 in Varna Oh what a pick up! Bumped over the top, that was sensational from Nishida He's showing it, full range of his weapons again Absolutely brilliant there from Fuji Defended as if their lives depended on it here so Fuji first off and no double-touch is cool there get it in play that's step one now can they get the block here there's a containing block still with the initiative Japan Takahashi rather yeah Takahashi nothing doing for him but you're not containing that Nishida getting great elevation just the angle of the head I mean unless you've got a blocker in place this is a clean winner and there's nobody there nobody at all that's a breakdown defensively for iran when he had a free hit now that is a monster block and nishida has arrived. Oh, I say. in front of home. They couldn't cope with it at all, could they? We are at match point. Four aces out of five serves. A cap serve. It's gone to the very last set. And it's taken Eugene Nishida and some devastating devastating serving to finally put Canada on the brink. Can he wrap it up? Can he wrap up the competition with yet another race? Here he goes. He has. He has. Unbelievable. Incredible. What a finish for Japan. What a way to end the 2019 FIVB World Cup. You're almost dead in the water. Uchiha continues with serve. Nice pick up there from Yamamoto. what about that Nishida saying oh yeah I'll have that no careful approach set up play needed off the dig Nishida said oh look look what I've got a freebie getting a lot of call time here in Chicago nice touch good work from Walsh has to be tipped though so Japan go again and all four attackers available but that's an incredible dig from Marshall and again mega rally developing then courtesy of some phenomenal defense and it's always best when a mega rally is finished with something special that's a spectacular hit down the line from the mega rally usually happens because you've got some good defensive sequences there were some brilliant pickups from Canada in that one and then this finish what's a wonderful line shot oh that's a beauty okay percentage used the mismatch well with him against Sakita especially that's perfect for Nishida down the line, super spike, run off, doesn't have much time to take a step, he just kind of jumps towards the spiker. I can't have a bit of breathing space again. These girls are capable. Wonderful pickup again. Wonderful, wonderful pickup. The pressure on Ishida finishes in his second attempt. Now, Japan back in complete control of the set again. Big, big hitting from Ishida. Ryland says, I've got to stop this again. Closes in on another 20-point 64 points in three matches in Leipzig it's been a very very productive long weekend for him where's this going it came back on first touch Japan will get another bite at it Germany really have to hold firm here and they do really good containment but Fukuzawa denied again that's brilliant stuff from Burma over there they'll bring it nearside Nishida somehow it's kept alive brilliant from Germany but eventually they break through they had to win it time after time after time again and that might be the point that breaks Germany badly here they did everything everything they could just to keep it alive block after block coming in but they could never get control of that rally the initiative always stayed with Japan you can see Nishida far side lurking, then setting up. Sakita says, where are you? She's in with the surf. Jump floats. Well. side lurking then setting up Sakita says where I jump floats well sometimes there are no words that was one of those times Nishida Falco is staying pretty close to the middle blocker there to help with the first tempo you can see he's right there and then a little start of step Lucas at 6'5 Japan have to just stay deep in digging in stay close powering through there got a couple of big bodies in front of him there leon luccarelli It's a big serving 20-year-old. I don't know how much better than this. Thank you so much. 12 punti messi a segno dallo schiacciatore nato Berlino nell'ult, l'ultima partita che ha visto impegnato vivo, quella a Padova, la sconfitta sanguinosa per Isar, pallone tutt'altro che preciso per Recine, la foto di Candellaro, però è così così, Saitta si inventa una magia dalla possibile invasione, si arrampica letteralmente sulla rete Davide Saitta e ha una mano invece di servire il proprio centrale rovescia con questo tocco delizioso per Saita, per Nishida che muro a zero, non può sbagliare, rete libera, tira un'altra bordata delle sue. E c'è dei ghiacciotti Mierda ce l'ha la pipe di Vukasinovic e Yujin Ishida con un tuffo incredibile riesce a gettare le mani dove proprio stava arrivando l'attacco di Vukasinovic lo vedete un po' fortunoso ma anche questa volta arriva il muro da parte di Nishida che si prende i complimenti di Valerio Baldovin 16 pari rientra dunque in parità Vibo, che ovviamente vuole fortemente il tie. Divertire il pubblico presente sugli spalti, vediamo ancora Riklitsky, l'eccezione di Vibo, c'è ancora Saita, ancora per Fromma, il muro di Perugia poi Nishida decide di fare tutto da solo decide di trovare il punto del meno 1 Vivo 10 Perugia 11 sostegno di Rizzo Nishida rivediamo Nishida questa bella palla l'attacco di Fromm vedete il muro la difesa di Vivo poi sottomisura. Scida fa la flash che non può che finire sul paraflex colorato d'arancio, quindi Scida 1 contro 1 non perdona, firma il 20.
